keyMappings:
unmap d
unmap x
unmap u
unmap J
unmap K
map K previousTab
map J nextTab
map d removeTab
map u restoreTab
searchEngines:
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
g: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
y: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
m: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google maps
a: https://www.amazon.de/s/?field-keywords=%s Amazon
f: https://apps.fedoraproject.org/packages/s/%s Fedora packages
d: https://packages.debian.org/search?keywords=%s Debian packages
